zh: 又叫我打扫卫生……每次都是我……\n凭什么啊……|算了，早点弄完回家吧，\n太晚妈妈该担心了
en: Cleaning duty …again. Why is it always me…\nWhatever,let's just get it done. Mom's going to worry if I'm late.
notes: 开局进入游戏弹出 · 开场独白 · 不可跳过

zh: 这是什么?小纸条破破烂烂的,好像有字?
en: What is this…? \nA tattered little note… \nWait, is that writing on it?
notes: 捡起破旧纸条(Pickup_OldNote) · 链到 old_note READ

zh:
扫扫扫……
欸,这是什么?
一本……日记?|好奇怪,这里怎么会有一本日记?
打开看看……
en:
Sweep, sweep, sweep…
Hm? What's this?
A… diary?
That's strange, what's a diary doing here? Let me take a look…
notes: 捡起日记(Pickup_Diary) · 链到 diary READ

zh: 好可怕……欸钥匙？\n好像是从日记本里掉出来的……|是……2楼储物柜的钥匙。\n没办法了……去2楼看看吧。
en:
So creepy… wait, a key?
Must've fallen out of the diary…
It's… a key to the storage room on the 2nd floor.
Well… guess I have no choice. Let's head upstairs.
notes: 阅读日记READ后弹出

zh: 咳咳……好多灰。\n这是什么东西？一个3D眼镜？|不对，这是红色和绿色的镜片？\n好奇怪，带上看看吧。
en: cough cough… So much dust. What's this? A pair of 3D glasses?\nWait— red and green lenses? That's weird.\nMight as well try them on.
notes: Cabinet_Locked 开锁瞬间 KeyDoor.openDialogueNodeId=T-05 触发

zh:
不一样的东西……
不会是……那个校园怪谈吧……
跳楼的女生……|戴上眼镜到处走走好了，
总要想办法出去。
en:
Something's… different…
Don't tell me… this is one of those school urban legends… the girl who jumped…
I'll just walk around with the glasses on.
 Gotta find a way out of here somehow.
notes: 眼镜 READ 后链过来 · dialogue.item.glasses.page.1.triggered

zh:
原来是情书啊，搞这么神秘。
易森不是前几届那个风云校草么，
居然会给别人写情书……|可是和诅咒有什么关系？
去4楼看看吧？|好像四楼封起来蛮久了，
也许会有什么线索。
en:
So it was a love letter all along, all that mystery for nothing. 
Ethan,the most popular guy a few years back?
 Can't believe someone like him would write a love letter… 
but what does any of this have to do with the curse?
Might as well check out the 4th floor. 
It's been sealed off for a while now… 
maybe there's something up there.
notes: LoveLetter READ 后链过来 · dialogue.item.love_letter.page.1.triggered · 戴绿镜时 READ 才可读

zh: 居然上锁了。\n怎么看也不像是原来的门锁，|一点都不匹配，看样子快要生锈了。\n钥匙应该还藏在这层楼的某处。
en:
Locked.
Doesn't look like the original lock either— doesn't match at all. 
And it's practically rusting through.
The key must be hidden somewhere else on this floor.
notes: 4F 楼梯门按E时触发 · 戴红镜 · 未持 stairs_4f 钥匙

zh: 藏在这么奇怪的地方……\n以前好像没见过呀……
en: Hidden in such a weird spot… \nI don't remember seeing this here before…
notes: note_01 READ 后链过来 · dialogue.item.mock_note_01.page.1.triggered

en: The security guard… is her dad?
notes: note_02 READ 后链过来 · dialogue.item.mock_note_02.page.1.triggered

zh: 他们说的是……日记的主人？\n红绿色盲吗……\n被这样欺负好可怜……
en: Are they talking about… the one who wrote the diary? \nRed-green colorblind… and they bullied her for it… \nthat's awful…
notes: note_03 READ 后链过来 · dialogue.item.mock_note_03.page.1.triggered

zh: 这里真的有备用钥匙！\n可是为什么……|不戴眼镜的时候看不到呢？\n感觉好像进入了另一个世界……
en: There really is a spare key here! \nBut why… couldn't I see it without the glasses?\nIt feels like I've stepped into another world…
notes: KeyB READ 之后链过来 · dialogue.item.key.stairs_4f.page.1.triggered

zh: 上来了!好多灰尘……\n有点害怕,这里面有什么……
en: Made it up! So much dust…\nI'm a little scared… what's in here…
notes: 传送到四楼场景入口触发

zh: 404教室……\n是前几年那个跳楼女生出事的地方呀……\n难道她就是知彩?
en: Classroom 404…\nThis is where it happened… the girl who jumped, a few years back…\nDon't tell me… she's Chisai?
notes: 按E 404教室门后弹出

zh:
黑板上好多血……不对……是油漆！
米莉，易森，菲菲，宇凯
——到此一游|神经病啊写这种东西！！
可是看起来好可怕……
en:
So much— is that blood on the blackboard…?
No… wait. It's paint.
"Milly, Ethan, Tiff, Rex
——was here"
What is WRONG with them, writing something like that!! 
But god, it looks so creepy…
notes: 按E黑板(Blackboard.prefab 已挂)

zh: 不要跳!知彩!!不要跳下去……\n她听不到我说话……不要……
en: Stop— don't jump! Chisai!! Don't jump…\nShe can't hear me… no… please…
notes: FlashbackController 播完闪回动画后 Fire()

zh: 录音笔……原来广播的声音来自这里……\n是那些霸凌知彩的人在笑!\n还有……知彩在哭……
en:
A voice recorder… 
so that's where the broadcast was coming from…
THEM— the ones who bullied Chisai.
 Laughing like it's nothing.
And… that's Chisai… 
crying…
notes: Recorder.nodeInspect=T-18 已挂

zh: ……该结束这一切了。\n笑声和哭泣声都停止了。|走廊里静得可怕。\n然后我该做什么……?
en:
…It's time to end this.
The laughter. The crying. All of it stopped.
The hallway fell into a terrible silence.
So now what…?
notes: Recorder.cs 停广播后 · Recorder.nodeStop=T-19 已挂

zh:
追杀我的那个怪人！！！！
他看起来……在哭？
是保安叔叔！！
他是知彩的爸爸！|为了寻找知彩跳楼自杀的真相，
才一直游荡在这幢教学楼里……
他看起来……也要消失了……
en:
That thing that was chasing me！！！！
It looks like… it's crying？
Wait— it's the security guard!! Chisai's dad！
All this time… wandering these halls… 
searching for the truth behind Chisai's death…
And now he looks like… 
he's fading away too…
notes: 保安进入 Stopped 状态后触发

zh: 居然已经天黑了啊。\n经历过刚才那些,走夜路都不怎么可怕了。 |(看手表)\n……不好!要被妈妈骂了, 快走吧!
en:
It's already dark out.
After everything that just happened… 
somehow walking home alone at night doesn't seem so scary anymore.
…Oh no. Mom is going to kill me. I need to go— now!
notes: 按E 1楼大门 · onDialogueFinished → VictoryPanel.Show escaped

zh: 一副矫正颜色的眼睛，\n戴上眼镜似乎可以看到一些不一样的东西……\n按Q键切换镜片颜色
en: A pair of color correction glasses. \nPutting them on seems to reveal things that weren't there before…\nPress Q to switch lens color.

zh: 可能是她的钥匙……她的储藏柜会在哪里呢?
en: Could be her key… but where would her locker be?

zh: 锁住了四楼的楼梯口，\n也锁住了秘密
en: It seals off the stairway to the 4th floor… and whatever secrets lie beyond.

zh:
知彩
2月1日 晴 今天天气好棒呀,加油知彩!你一定可以坚持下去的!
2月5日 雨 他们又叫我放学去储藏室……我真的不想去……好害怕……
2月5日 雨 他们又抢走了我的储物柜钥匙……下次要藏好一点……没来得及换衣服被体育老师罚跑了……
en:
Chisai
Feb 1, Sunny Today's weather is so nice. Come on, Chisai! You can get through this!
Feb 5, Rainy They're telling me to go to the storage room after school again… I really don't want to go… I'm so scared…
Feb 5, Rainy They took my locker key again… I need to hide it better next time…

zh: 2月12日 雨 不喜欢下雨,每次下雨他们不出去玩就会来找我的麻烦。储物柜被泼了油漆……好过分……伤口好疼……\n3月13日 阴 为什么……为什么是我?为什么欺负我……我做错了什么?\n3月23日 阴 再坚持一下吧……爸爸花了那么多钱就为了让我在这里……可是好痛苦……
en: Feb 12, Rainy I hate rainy days. When it rains they don't go out to play and they come after me instead. They poured paint all over my locker… so cruel… the cuts hurt so much…\nMar 13, Cloudy Why… why me? Why are they doing this to me… what did I do wrong?\nMar 23, Cloudy Just hold on a little longer… Dad spent so much money to get me into this school… but it hurts so much…

zh: 5月2日 好难过……我要坚持不下去了……好过分……好痛苦……\n5月8日 晴 好像逃走……可是爸爸怎么办……\n6月1日 雨 好想……杀掉他们……我不敢……不要……不要……我快要坚持不下去了……?
en: May 2 I'm so sad… I don't think I can hold on anymore… it's so cruel… it hurts so much… May 8, Sunny I want to run away… but what about Dad…\nJun 1, Rainy I want to… kill them… I can't… no… no… I don't know how much longer I can take this…?

zh: 6月8日 雨 好想回家……都去死都去死都去死都去死!!!\n6月9日 死死死死死!!!!\n6月12日 都别想逃出这里!你也是!
en: Jun 8, Rainy I want to go home… All of you, die die die die die!!\nJun 9 Die die die die die!!!!\nJun 12 None of you are getting out of here. You either.

zh: 一根亮着灯的录音笔,好像一直在播放……
en: A voice recorder with its light still on, playing something on loop…

zh:
我一直有注意到你哦，知彩。
抱歉，我没办法每次都及时保护你，所以……
我想了一个办法，
我想和你在一起。
请一定要相信我，放学后来402教室，
我会在那里等你。
——易森
en:
I've always noticed you, Chisai.
I'm sorry… I wasn't always there in time to protect you.
So I thought of something.
I want to be with you.
Please trust me— come to classroom 404 after school. I'll be waiting.
— Ethan

zh: 广播被诅咒了!广播响的时候必须躲起来!!是她!她回来找我们了!!
en: The PA system is cursed! When the broadcast plays, you have to hide!! It's her— she's come back for us!!

zh: 不会吧她真信了？\n今天放学有好戏看咯！
en: No way she actually believed it?\nThis is gonna be good after school today!

zh:
她那个多事的爸爸不知道钥匙被拿走了吧，
可别让他发现了。|这有什么，一个保安大叔而已，
一起捉弄又怎么样哈哈哈！
不过知彩未免也太好骗了。
en:
That nosy dad of hers has no idea the key's been taken, right? 
Better hope he doesn't find out.
Relax, he's just a security guard. 
It's just a prank, what's the big deal haha!
Besides, Chisai is way too easy to fool.

zh: 我办事你放心，\n这种早该去特殊学校的人就别来这里读书了。\n真是怪胎，连红色绿色都分不清。
en:
Trust me on this. 
Someone like her should've been sent to a special school a long time ago— 
she's got no business being here.
Such a freak. Can't even tell red from green.

zh: 你看穿了棱镜禁区的秘密。
en: You saw through the Prism Zone.

zh: 你出来了。三棱镜看见了一切。
en: You made it out. The prism saw everything.

zh: 门被锁住了 — 需要钥匙
en: The door is locked - you need a key.

zh: 这把钥匙打不开这个锁
en: This key doesn't fit this lock.
